Let me show you guys how to create a solo ad. So solo ads guys, solo ads, solo ads. There are two types of solo ads that you can create. This is called the two-minute solo ad formula. And the reason that I do that is because remember, we're a fixed cost marketing world. So I want as much traffic as possible. There's lots of different tracking stuff. If your ad turns out to be profitable and the time span for profitability that I normally use is about 60 to 90 days, if it's approaching profitability, so if it's like 70% profitable in the first 30 days, then you're going to be profitable in the first 30 days. I'll go back to that newsletter publisher and I'll say, hey, this looks like it's working out pretty good. Let's set up a long-term deal. This is how we put this on autopilot. And typically what I do is I'll say, I'll take whatever the monthly cost is. So let's say that we have an ad that's, let's say we have an ad that's $100. And let's say we made $80 in our first 30 days. What the average marketer would say is, well, that is not a good place to advertise. I'm not going to go back there. But what I do is I go back and I say, hey, I'd like to set up a long-term deal. Is it OK? Like, and here's what I'd like to do. If I say that I'll do a newsletter ad with you, you can use the same copy every single time with you every single month for the next, let's say, five months, six months. Let's say six months. Because newsletter publishers like, they like recurring revenue. They like to get their money all the time. Could we do it for? Six times 80 is 48, 480 bucks. Most of the time, what that newsletter publisher will say to me, so in other words, what I'm doing is I'm taking the results of that first 30 days. OK, I made $80. Let me go back and to that newsletter publisher put this on autopilot and reduce my risk. Could we do it for 480 bucks for the next six months? Just have it go out the first day of the month or the first Monday of the month each and every month. Sure, I've never had anyone say no. So the average marketer would say $100 only made 80.
